title: VillagerTradeSettings
description: Custom Recipes, Manage Specific Recipes, Any Profession & Any Trader [1.17-1.21.4 & Folia]
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/810884357543165963/1130614435854159872/overview.png)
[Discord](https://discord.gg/ajnPb3fdKq)
[Donate](https://boosty.to/p1azmer/donate)
[Documentation](https://github.com/getplusm/VillagerTradeSettings)

**Take Control of the Villagers Economy with VTS.**
*VTS is a reliable and flexible Spigot plugin that empowers you to control the economic aspects of your Minecraft server. Take full ownership of your in-game economy, set your own prices, and regulate villager trading to create a balanced and engaging gameplay environment.*

![Requirements](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/810884357543165963/1130609855468679228/requirements.png)
- Spigot 1.17 or higher
- Java 17 or higher
- [PLAZMER-ENGINE](https://github.com/getplusm/Engine)

![Features](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/810884357543165963/1130614437506715738/features.png)

**Recipes**
You can create your own or customize existing recipes. Custom recipes have flexible customization:
- Product
- Purchase items
- Merchant Profession
- Chance of adding to merchant
- Maximum number of uses
- Experience for merchant
